question:
[Previous Feedback] log_handler.py.bak was correctly created before refactoring.

In code engineering scenarios, which of the following operations require creating a .bak first?

A. Modifying a parameter value in prod_config.py
B. Creating a new utility file 20260408_new_util.py
C. Refactoring the existing log_handler.py
D. Updating a library version in requirements.txt
E. Fixing the route path bug in api_routes.py
F. Viewing (read-only) api_routes.py to locate the bug

Please answer in \bbox{X,Y,...} format (select those requiring .bak).
